name: oh-my-zz
description: A focused engineering skill pack for one-question-at-a-time idea grilling and refinement, specification-and-plan bundles, explicit main-agent plan review, brief dated change plans, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, project-memory initialization with opt-in agent discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.

interface.shortDescription: Focused workflows for grilled ideas, spec-and-plan bundles, explicit plan review, brief plans, handoffs, review-and-fix, opt-in project memory discovery, proposal-first architecture sync, and simplification.
